## Family reunification: Understanding family class sponsorship applications

## Family reunification: Understanding family class sponsorship applications
Senior Associate, Valerie Kleinman, and Articling Student, Faith Davis, have been featured in Law360 Canada for their latest article on family reunification and family class sponsorship applications.
With family reunification remaining a central pillar of Canada’s immigration system, Valerie and Faith break down the key sponsorship pathways, eligibility requirements, and important distinctions between inland and overseas applications.
This article was originally published by Law360 Canada, part of LexisNexis Canada Inc.

- Valerie Kleinman View Author Bio
